question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not list the main sections of the thesis. Instead, it presents a timeline of tasks and deadlines, which is not equivalent to outlining the chapters or main parts of a thesis. There is no indication of chapter titles or thematic sections such as Introduction, Literature Review, Methodology, etc.

question: Description
feedback: The text does not describe the content of any section of the thesis. It only lists activities and their deadlines, without explaining what each section would contain or its purpose within the overall structure of the work.

question: Structure
feedback: The text does not convey the general structure of the thesis. It functions as a project timeline rather than a structural outline. As such, it is not possible to understand the logical flow or organization of the thesis from this text alone.
